ops.note: Deployed from the released 0.16.0 wheel; com.cc-steer.watch runs=1 with a single clean start, idle footprint 432MB phys (vs ~5GB eager), ==0.16.0 pin + hardened ccp guard verified in the plist. ~45min monitored with zero restarts/tracebacks/proposals; the user waived the rest of the 1h soak ("no need to soak, just get this shipped"). The fire→evict cycle is proven by the parity harness (real weights: load → unload → reload, float-identical) and unit tests; an organic in-daemon fire will exercise it in production.
